title: bdjameson/sediment-nosZ: Microprofile and molecular data
author: Brett D. Jameson
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This release contains raw data files for sediment microprofiles, nosZ qPCR assays, and 16S rRNA ASV tables associated with the manuscript "High abundances and expression levels of atypical, non-denitrifier N2O reductases drive microbial N2O consumption rates in a minimally impacted mangrove stand."
steps_raw: This release contains raw data files for sediment microprofiles, nosZ qPCR assays, and 16S rRNA ASV tables associated with the manuscript "High abundances and expression levels of atypical, non-denitrifier N2O reductases drive microbial N2O consumption rates in a minimally impacted mangrove stand."
